_comment: TB-1 (#357) orchestration profiles. Seeded once into ~/.tangleclaw/orchestration-profiles.json on first boot, then OPERATOR-OWNED (TC never overwrites your edits). Each profile maps to (baseUrl, model, keyRef). A project binds to a profile name via its `orchestrationProfile` field; at launch TC injects OPENAI_API_BASE/OPENAI_API_KEY (env) + --model (arg) for that launch only. Endpoints MUST use Tailscale MagicDNS names, never raw IPs. keyRef is a reference (file:<path> or env:<NAME>) resolved at launch — the secret is never stored here. A null baseUrl marks a not-yet-landed endpoint: the profile is selectable but refuses to inject (honest degradation, no silent fallback).
